news:news.news:title: The ongoing Middle East conflict and recent global events are reshaping international relations and domestic policies across various nations.
news:news.news:keywords: Middle East conflict impact on travel, social media addiction ruling implications, EU-US trade deal approval, legal issues in France, transgender rights protests in India

news:news.news:title: The ongoing Iran war is impacting global oil prices and causing significant disruptions in various sectors, including transportation and energy supply.
news:news.news:keywords: impact of Iran war on US economy, Ticketmaster fee changes, Clear app usage surge, US Postal Service fuel surcharge, potential fuel shortages in Europe

news:news.news:title: Senators are calling for comprehensive energy-use disclosures from data centers, while various tech companies are making strides in AI, robotics, and consumer electronics.
news:news.news:keywords: energy consumption in data centers, AI localization tools, robotaxi developments, OpenAI chatbot news, consumer electronics discounts

news:news.news:title: Baseball's Opening Day marks the start of the season, while significant NBA and NFL developments also capture attention in the sports world.
news:news.news:keywords: MLB Opening Day 2026, NBA standout performances, NFL draft predictions, IOC transgender policy changes, March Madness Sweet 16 preview

news:news.news:title: Recent scientific discoveries reveal advanced animal behaviors, new insights into sleep and health, and significant findings in genetics and astronomy.
news:news.news:keywords: animal intelligence and tool use, vivid dreams and sleep quality, genetic discoveries in extreme environments, long COVID immune response, Parkinson's disease research

news:news.news:title: Meta and YouTube have been found liable in a significant social media addiction trial, potentially affecting numerous similar cases in the US.
news:news.news:keywords: social media addiction lawsuits, US-Iran peace talks, Middle East conflict impact on aviation, UN resolution on slavery, Philippines energy crisis

news:news.news:title: Global stock markets rose on optimism over a potential Iran peace plan, while concerns about fuel shortages and rising costs persist.
news:news.news:keywords: Iran peace plan impact on global markets, US Postal Service fuel surcharge details, Europe fuel shortage warnings, AI datacenter construction moratorium, Delta Airlines service changes due to funding issues

news:news.news:title: Intel and LG Display may have achieved the best laptop battery life, surpassing competitors like Apple and Qualcomm.
news:news.news:keywords: laptop battery life advancements, Amazon Big Spring Sale deals, Meta layoffs and AI investment, Spotify artist protection features, gaming console price increases

news:news.news:title: The Boston Celtics ended the Oklahoma City Thunder's 12-game winning streak, while various controversies and predictions shape the sports landscape.
news:news.news:keywords: Celtics vs. Thunder game recap, Puka Nacua lawsuit details, MLB season predictions, March Madness Sweet 16 preview, NFL player controversies

news:news.news:title: Recent scientific discoveries include new insights into diabetes treatment, the search for extraterrestrial life, and the behavior of pollinators and memory storage in the brain.
news:news.news:keywords: breakthroughs in diabetes treatment, habitable exoplanets, honey bee behavior, insulin delivery advancements, deep-sea discoveries

news:news.news:title: Meta and YouTube Found Liable in Landmark Social Media Addiction Trial, Sparking Legal Ripple Effects
